Title: Client sends a valid request to the Broker
Preconditions: Client is connected to the Broker.
Test Steps:
1. Client sends a valid request to the Broker.
2. Broker receives the request.
3. Broker forwards the request to the Storage Manager.
4. Storage Manager processes the request and stores the data in the Local Storage.
Expected Result: The request is successfully processed and stored in the Local Storage.

Title: Client sends an invalid request to the Broker
Preconditions: Client is connected to the Broker.
Test Steps:
1. Client sends an invalid request to the Broker.
2. Broker receives the invalid request.
3. Broker forwards the invalid request to the Storage Manager.
4. Storage Manager processes the invalid request and returns an error.
Expected Result: The invalid request is rejected, and an error is returned to the Client.

Title: Broker forwards a valid request to the Storage Manager
Preconditions: Broker is connected to the Storage Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Broker receives a valid request.
2. Broker forwards the valid request to the Storage Manager.
3. Storage Manager processes the request and stores the data in the Local Storage.
Expected Result: The request is successfully processed and stored in the Local Storage.

Title: Broker forwards an invalid request to the Storage Manager
Preconditions: Broker is connected to the Storage Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Broker receives an invalid request.
2. Broker forwards the invalid request to the Storage Manager.
3. Storage Manager processes the invalid request and returns an error.
Expected Result: The invalid request is rejected, and an error is returned to the Broker.

Title: Storage Manager stores valid data in the Local Storage
Preconditions: Storage Manager is connected to the Local Storage.
Test Steps:
1. Storage Manager receives a valid request.
2. Storage Manager stores the valid data in the Local Storage.
Expected Result: The data is successfully stored in the Local Storage.

Title: Storage Manager stores invalid data in the Local Storage
Preconditions: Storage Manager is connected to the Local Storage.
Test Steps:
1. Storage Manager receives an invalid request.
2. Storage Manager attempts to store the invalid data in the Local Storage.
3. Local Storage rejects the invalid data.
Expected Result: The invalid data is not stored in the Local Storage, and an error is returned to the Storage Manager.

Title: User reads settings from the Settings class
Preconditions: User is connected to the Settings class.
Test Steps: 1. User calls the readSettings() method on the Settings class.
Expected Result: The settings are successfully retrieved and returned to the User.

Title: User fails to read settings from the Settings class due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is connected to the Settings class.
Test Steps: 1. User calls the readSettings() method on the Settings class with invalid credentials.
Expected Result: An error is returned to the User indicating that the credentials are invalid.

Title: User logs in as Admin
Preconditions: User is connected to the Admin class.
Test Data: Valid username and password for Admin.
Test Steps: 1. User calls the login method with valid Admin credentials.
Expected Result: The User is logged in as Admin.

Title: User fails to log in as Admin due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is connected to the Admin class.
Test Data: Invalid username and password for Admin.
Test Steps: 1. User calls the login method with invalid Admin credentials.
Expected Result: An error is returned to the User indicating that the credentials are invalid.

Title: Estimate validates valid input data
Preconditions: Estimate is connected to the Broker and API.
Test Steps: 1. Estimate validates the valid input data.
Expected Result: The input data is considered valid.

Title: Estimate fails to validate invalid input data
Preconditions: Estimate is connected to the Broker and API.
Test Steps: 1. Estimate attempts to validate the invalid input data.
Expected Result: The input data is considered invalid, and an error is shown.

Title: Broker processes valid input data
Preconditions: Broker is connected to the API.
Test Steps: 1. Broker processes the valid input data.
Expected Result: The input data is processed correctly and forwarded to the API.

Title: Broker fails to process invalid input data
Preconditions: Broker is connected to the API.
Test Steps: 1. Broker attempts to process the invalid input data.
Expected Result: The invalid input data is rejected, and an error is returned to the Broker.

Title: API processes valid input data
Preconditions: API is connected to the Broker.
Test Steps: 1. API processes the valid input data.
Expected Result: The input data is processed correctly and produces a valid output.

Title: API fails to process invalid input data
Preconditions: API is connected to the Broker.
Test Steps: 1. API attempts to process the invalid input data.
Expected Result: The invalid input data is rejected, and an error is returned to the API.

Title: Local Storage stores valid data
Preconditions: Local Storage is connected to the Storage Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Local Storage receives valid data from the Storage Manager.
2. Local Storage stores the valid data.
Expected Result: The data is successfully stored in the Local Storage.

Title: Local Storage fails to store invalid data
Preconditions: Local Storage is connected to the Storage Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Local Storage receives invalid data from the Storage Manager.
2. Local Storage attempts to store the invalid data.
Expected Result: The invalid data is not stored in the Local Storage, and an error is returned to the Storage Manager.

Title: Admin logs in
Preconditions: Admin is connected to the Admin class.
Test Data: Valid username and password for Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Admin calls the login method with valid Admin credentials.
Expected Result: The Admin is logged in.

Title: Admin fails to log in due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: Admin is connected to the Admin class.
Test Data: Invalid username and password for Admin.
Test Steps: 1. Admin calls the login method with invalid Admin credentials.
Expected Result: An error is returned to the Admin indicating that the credentials are invalid.
